![Dimensions logo](https://app.dimensions.ai/images/logo_small.png)

# Sign in

Next

Need an account? [Register for free](https://app.dimensions.ai/auth/base/register?redirect=%2Fdiscover%2Fpublication%3Fsearch_text%3Dbank%26search_type%3Dkws%26search_field%3Dfull_search)

# Free access to the Dimensions linked research database

- Search all publications and datasets
- Access millions of Open Access publications
- Seamlessly export data and set alerts
- Track citation counts and other publication metrics

[Register for free](https://app.dimensions.ai/auth/base/register?redirect=%2Fdiscover%2Fpublication%3Fsearch_text%3Dbank%26search_type%3Dkws%26search_field%3Dfull_search)

metadata.description: Re-imagining discovery and access to research: grants, datasets, publications, citations, clinical trials, patents and policy documents in one place.
metadata.ogDescription: Re-imagining discovery and access to research: grants, datasets, publications, citations, clinical trials, patents and policy documents in one place. With more than 100 million publications and 1 billion citations freely available for personal use, Dimensions provides students and researchers access to the data and information they need - with the lowest barriers possible.
